name: @kidmemory/protocol
description: KidMemory unified protocol layer - API types, error codes, and response formats

scripts.docs:openapi: npm --prefix ../sidecar run gen:openapi && npm --prefix ../cloud-api run gen:openapi && node scripts/enhance-openapi-docs.mjs && npx redoc-cli bundle openapi/sidecar.openapi.enhanced.json --options.hideHostname=true --options.pathInMiddlePanel=true -o openapi/sidecar.openapi.preview.zh.html && npx redoc-cli bundle openapi/cloud-api.openapi.enhanced.json --options.hideHostname=true --options.pathInMiddlePanel=true -o openapi/cloud-api.openapi.preview.zh.html

author: KidMemory Team
